title: Bioinformatics Modality Core Vocabulary v1
source: BioMedPilot curated shared medical vocabulary checklist
curation_scope: Curated core bioinformatics data modality and assay terms for Chinese topic retrieval, GEO/TCGA/GTEx/SRA query drafts, and Meta Analysis omics topic understanding.

items.label: expression profiling
items.ambiguity_notes: Broad expression profiling term; may require platform disambiguation between sequencing and array.

items.label: RNA-seq
items.ambiguity_notes: RNA-seq should not match scRNA-seq as a substring.

items.label: bulk RNA-seq
items.ambiguity_notes: Bulk assay distinct from single-cell RNA-seq.

items.label: microarray
items.ambiguity_notes: Broad chip term; expression array if transcriptomic context is present.

items.label: expression array
items.ambiguity_notes: Expression array, not SNP or methylation array.

items.label: single-cell RNA-seq
items.ambiguity_notes: Single-cell RNA-seq should not automatically expand to bulk RNA-seq.

items.label: single-nucleus RNA-seq
items.ambiguity_notes: Single-nucleus assay distinct from single-cell RNA-seq.

items.label: DNA methylation array
items.ambiguity_notes: Methylation array assay, distinct from expression arrays.

items.label: whole-genome bisulfite sequencing
items.preferred_zh: 全基因组亚硫酸氢盐测序
expected_terms: 全基因组亚硫酸氢盐测序

items.label: reduced representation bisulfite sequencing
items.preferred_zh: 简化代表性亚硫酸氢盐测序
expected_terms: 简化代表性亚硫酸氢盐测序

items.label: ChIP-seq
items.ambiguity_notes: Protein-DNA binding or histone mark assay; not ATAC-seq.

items.label: CUT&RUN
en_synonyms: cleavage under targets and release using nuclease
expected_terms: cleavage under targets and release using nuclease

items.label: histone modification profiling
items.ambiguity_notes: Histone mark profiling, usually ChIP-seq/CUT&Tag context.

items.label: whole genome sequencing
items.ambiguity_notes: Whole genome sequencing, not whole exome sequencing.

items.label: whole exome sequencing
items.ambiguity_notes: Whole exome sequencing, not whole genome sequencing.

items.label: single-cell ATAC-seq
zh_synonyms: 单细胞染色质开放性测序
expected_terms: 单细胞染色质开放性测序

items.label: CITE-seq
zh_synonyms: 细胞索引转录组表位测序
en_synonyms: cellular indexing of transcriptomes and epitopes by sequencing
expected_terms: cellular indexing of transcriptomes and epitopes by sequencing
细胞索引转录组表位测序
items.ambiguity_notes: Single-cell RNA plus protein tag assay.

items.label: multiome ATAC + gene expression
items.ambiguity_notes: Joint ATAC and gene expression assay.

items.label: proteomics
items.ambiguity_notes: Proteomics should not expand to metabolomics.

items.label: metabolomics
items.ambiguity_notes: Metabolomics should not expand to proteomics.

items.label: lipidomics
items.ambiguity_notes: Lipidomics is related to but distinct from broad metabolomics.

items.label: sequencing
items.ambiguity_notes: Broad ambiguous sequencing term; do not strongly infer a specific sequencing assay.

ambiguity_terms.note: Do not expand to bulk RNA-seq.
Broad Chinese chip term; default to broad microarray context unless SNP/methylation is explicit.
Broad expression profiling term spanning RNA-seq and microarray contexts.
Broad sequencing term; do not strongly infer RNA-seq/WGS/WES.
